---
title: "CV"
---

A web CV written directly in markdown. Edit the sections below — add,
remove, or rename them as you like. If you'd rather link to a PDF, drop
one into the project folder and replace this page with a link to it.

## Education

**PhD in Your Field**, Your University — *2022–present*
Thesis: *A Working Title That Will Change Five Times*. Advisor: Prof. A. Mentor.

**MSc in Your Field**, Another University — *2020–2022*
Thesis: *An Earlier Title You No Longer Love*.

**BSc in Your Field**, First University — *2017–2020*

## Positions

**Visiting Researcher**, Somewhere Lab — *Summer 2024*
One line on what you did.

**Research Assistant**, Your University — *2021–2022*
One line on what you did.

## Awards & grants

- **Travel grant**, Some Funding Body — 2024
- **Best poster**, Some Conference — 2023
- **Graduate scholarship**, Your University — 2022

## Teaching

- *Introduction to Your Field* (TA), Your University — 2023, 2024
- Guest lecture, *A Related Course* — 2024

## Service

- Reviewer: *Journal A*, *Journal B*
- Co-organizer, Student seminar series — 2023–present
